data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for effective/expiry windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for effective/expiry windows, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or records related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for effective/expiry windows, yet no actual records or checks are presented in the evidence to confirm this requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for effective/expiry windows
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the effective/expiry windows requirement.
